instructionalDaysDescription: MySchoolDates calculated this count from the published OUSD calendar by excluding listed weekday holidays, professional development days, collaboration/work days, teacher work days, and breaks between August 11, 2025 and May 28, 2026.
seoTitle: Oakland Unified School District Calendar 2025-2026 (OUSD) | Holidays, PDF & ICS
seoDescription: View the OUSD 2025-2026 calendar verified against the official district PDF, with Aug 11 first day, May 28 last day, holidays, breaks, printable PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: OUSD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 11, 2025 and ends instruction on May 28, 2026. Thanksgiving Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs April 6-10. The calendar also includes no-school days for professional development on September 19 and January 5.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Oakland Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Oakland Unified students start school on Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is OUSD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the OUSD 2025-2026 calendar runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for OUSD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of instruction for Oakland Unified is Thursday, May 28, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is OUSD Winter Break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 22, 2025 through Friday, January 2, 2026. January 5 is a professional development day, and students begin the spring semester on January 6.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Calculated from the official OUSD calendar after excluding listed weekday no-school days and breaks.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: OUSD's 2026 Spring Break is a five-weekday break in early April.

yearNumbers.label: Student PD Days
yearNumbers.detail: September 19 and January 5 are professional development days with no school for students.

customSections.label: OUSD Calendar Planning Numbers
customSections.content: These 2025-2026 figures add context to the Oakland Unified calendar without repeating the main date cards. They are meant for family logistics, not as a substitute for the official PDF.

groups.label: 2025-2026 planning numbers
items: 2 semester start dates: August 11, 2025 for the fall term and January 6, 2026 after Winter Break and a professional development day.
3 long recess windows: Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break create the largest childcare and travel planning blocks.

7 standalone no-school weekdays before Spring Break: Professional Development Days, Indigenous Peoples' Day, Veterans Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Presidents' Day, and Cesar Chavez Day (in lieu) appear outside the major break periods.
1 late-May ending window: the year ends May 28, 2026, with Memorial Day immediately before the final week.
80+ schools and programs: districtwide dates are a starting point, but school-level calendars still matter for bell schedules, orientations, athletics, and ceremonies.

events.name: Indigenous Peoples' Day
events.description: Observed in lieu of Lincoln's Birthday.
